summary: Tested three new major pages: Daily Briefing (/daily-briefing), Adviser Dashboard (/adviser-dashboard), and Client Portal (/client-portal). All features working correctly. Navigation updated with 'New' badges on Daily Briefing and Adviser Dashboard. Client Portal in Adviser Tools section.

Daily Briefing shows greeting based on time of day ('Good Afternoon, James')
Daily Briefing shows current date (Wednesday 11 March 2026)

critical_code_review_comments: DailyBriefing.jsx (537 lines) - Well-structured with greeting logic, KPI cards, performance chart, AI recommendations, deadlines, market summary, quick actions
AdviserDashboard.jsx (744 lines) - Comprehensive multi-client management with 4 tabs (Overview, Clients, Tasks, Compliance), 5 mock clients with varied types
ClientPortal.jsx (485 lines) - Simplified client view with own header (no Layout wrapper), 4 tabs (Overview, Goals, Documents, Adviser), mock client data
Layout.jsx navigation properly updated with Daily Briefing and Adviser Dashboard having 'New' badges
All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Mock data is well-structured with realistic Australian financial data
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - uses mock data defined in components (MOCK_CLIENTS in AdviserDashboard.jsx, CLIENT_DATA in ClientPortal.jsx)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested 3 new pages: 1) DailyBriefing at /daily-briefing - personalized daily summary with greeting, 4 KPI cards (Net Worth, Shares, Property, Cashflow), 6-month performance chart, AI recommendations, upcoming deadlines, market summary (ASX 200, AUD/USD, RBA rate), quick actions. 2) AdviserDashboard at /adviser-dashboard - multi-client management with 5 KPI cards (Total AUM, Clients, Urgent Tasks, Reviews Due, Avg Compliance), 4 tabs (Overview with charts, Clients with table/search/filters, Tasks sorted by priority, Compliance status), 5 mock clients (Wheeler Family, Chen Trust, Thompson SMSF, Patel Holdings, Garcia Family). 3) ClientPortal at /client-portal - simplified client view with own header (no sidebar), greeting banner, action items alert, 4 tabs (Overview with portfolio/chart, Goals with progress tracking, Documents with download, Adviser with contact/messages). Navigation updated with 'New' badges on Daily Briefing and Adviser Dashboard, Client Portal in Adviser Tools section. Compliance modal appears on all pages.

mocked_apis.Daily Briefing: MOCK DATA - All data from usePortfolio context and simulated values
mocked_apis.Adviser Dashboard: MOCK DATA - MOCK_CLIENTS array with 5 clients defined in component
mocked_apis.Client Portal: MOCK DATA - CLIENT_DATA object with sample client data defined in component
